name: Fruit Curry
recipeIngredient: 3 Green apples, cored and sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, water, and 1 teaspoon salt in a pot. Steam for 1 hour.
2. In a separate pan, sauté onions with 1 teaspoon salt in oil until onions are tender.
3. Add zucchini and eggplant to the pan and fry until tender.
4. Lightly stir in fruits, apple juice, red wine vinegar, fresh lemon juice, curry powder, and lemon peel.
5. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Place steamed rice into a buttered 3-quart baking dish.
7. Cover with the sautéed mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and garnish with peanuts and bananas.
10. Serve immediately. Serves 8 to 10.
Variations:
For the meat-eating crown, use 1/2 pound ground lamb or pork instead of zucchini and eggplant. When fresh fruits are not available, use 1 1/2 cups dried apples and 3/4 cup dried peaches, reconstituting them in warm water for 1 hour before using them.
